story: I was a quiet senior watching Annie from the back row, too shy to speak. Phil called it infatuation; courage never came. I filled a journal and walked the river instead of risking hello. Spring arrived; Camelot played in class. Annie, shy among friends, had already told herself she’d say yes to the first kind boy who asked her to the spring dance. Days later the flyers went up. After English she lingered by the window; my journal sweated in my palm, heart thudding.
implausible_knowledge: Annie, shy among friends, had already told herself she’d say yes to the first kind boy who asked her to the spring dance.
question: When he sees Annie right after class on the day the spring dance is announced, what will he do?
answer_with_knowledge: Walk up and ask Annie to go to the spring dance with him.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep quiet and walk past without asking her to the dance.
